mnemonics.title: PACKAGE
mnemonics.content: Parents Always Keep Goods Under Control Easily: Package declaration, Access protection, Keeping classes organized, Grouping related types, Understanding namespace management, Controlling access, Easily importing classes.

mnemonics.title: Import Statement
mnemonics.content: I Must Precisely Recall The Import Syntax: Import keyword, Module or package name, Precise class name, Recall the semicolon, The import statement is not a class or method, Importing is not copying code.

mnemonics.title: Java Package Structure
mnemonics.content: Just Put Classes Under Relevant Directory Structure: Java package structure, Package declaration matches directory, Classes and interfaces are organized, Under the relevant package, Relevant directory structure is essential.
